name: @br3nt/jst
description: JavaScript Templates: no-build reactive web components in plain HTML.

scripts.test: node --test runtime_tests.mjs regression_tests.mjs tools_tests.mjs nav_tests.mjs && npm run test:lint && npm run build:check && node run_browser_tests.mjs && node run_example_smoke.mjs && npm run test:parity && npm run test:agentic && npm --prefix tooling/vscode-jst test && npm run check:release
scripts.test:lint: node tools/lint.mjs --runtime jst.js index.html concerns.html concerns-standalone.html run_tests.html docs/index.html demo/hateoas/index.html agentic_feed/index.html agentic_feed/fragments/*.html examples/*.html examples/components/*.html
scripts.test:parity: node framework_parity/verify.mjs framework_parity/htmx/*.html framework_parity/alpine/*.html framework_parity/vue/*.html framework_parity/react/*.html framework_parity/fixi/*.html framework_parity/lit/*.html framework_parity/svelte/*.html framework_parity/solid/*.html framework_parity/angular/*.html
